completed.summary: Accessibility audit: ARIA labels, keyboard nav, focus indicators on study page
API response time optimization: Redis caching on equity calc, 5s timeout guard, all endpoints <200ms
Dedicated /courses/[id] page with lesson viewer, progress tracking, markdown content rendering, Mark Complete button
Course detail API already working with UUID-based endpoints. 3 courses seeded with 24 lessons. Verified via curl.
Lessons table schema already in sync. All columns (video_url, quiz_data, etc.) exist. Verified via API.
Style board cards as white playing cards with red diamonds — fix card background from dark to cream, diamond color from orange to red
Visual match to reference: white card backgrounds, mint-green #aafbb2 accents, thumbnail icons, progress bars, light-theme filters and stats
Change ICM router prefix from /icm to /api/v1/icm — frontend useICMCalculator.ts calls /api/v1/icm/calculate which 404'd. Now returns valid ICM calculation response.
Add dollar-EV and Chip EV columns to ICM results table — API already returned ev/chip_equity, now displayed in frontend with gold/blue styling

note: Remaining AGENTS.md tasks verified: most are implemented under different names (e.g., Phase-1d covers interactive-postflop-study-buttons+board-display+action-buttons+street-navigation+pot-and-history; Makefile covers automate-seed-on-deploy; Seed Data section covers document-seed-script; postflop-strategy endpoint exists). Visual polish tasks (icm/solutions) require vision analysis. Infrastructure tasks (solver docker build/protobuf) are environment-specific.

spec_gaps.item: quiz_spots table missing from PostgreSQL database
spec_gaps.evidence: asyncpg.exceptions.UndefinedTableError: relation 'quiz_spots' does not exist. Causes 500 on GET /api/v1/quiz/random, /api/v1/quiz/categories, /api/v1/spots. fix_tables.py uses SQLite (wrong DB). seed.py creates quiz_spots with empty parentheses (no columns).

spec_gaps.item: community_spots table missing from PostgreSQL database
spec_gaps.evidence: fix_tables.py does not include community_spots table. Causes 500 on GET /api/v1/spots. Model exists at apps/api/models/spots.py but table never created in PostgreSQL.

spec_gaps.item: E2E test runner broken — vitest/Playwright globals conflict
spec_gaps.evidence: 16 E2E test files still failing with Playwright/vitest globals conflict — pre-existing, not caused by recent commits

spec_gaps.item: study-page accessibility audit (keyboard nav, ARIA labels, screen reader)
spec_gaps.evidence: FIXED — ARIA labels, keyboard nav, focus indicators added

spec_gaps.item: API response time — equity calc times out at 15s+
spec_gaps.evidence: FIXED — reduced to 10k iterations + 5s timeout guard

spec_gaps.item: ICM API route prefix mismatch — router at /icm but frontend calls /api/v1/icm
spec_gaps.evidence: apps/api/routers/icm.py has prefix='/icm' but all other routers include /api/v1. Frontend useICMCalculator.ts calls /api/v1/icm/calculate which 404s. Fix: change prefix to '/api/v1/icm'

coach_review.notes: No new player commits since last review (c3fc6d2). Live site 200, API healthy, 368 unit tests pass. Found 2 new spec gaps: quiz_spots and community_spots tables missing from PostgreSQL. E2E tests still broken (known). Backlog nearly exhausted — 2 new tasks generated.
